content.en:
Hanhai District Boundary.

In a small community boundary called River Wind, there are many Dao Ancestors here, many of them are Sevenfold Dao Ancestors, and the strongest even has the peak realm of Sevenfold Dao Ancestors.

It can be said that this community boundary is very powerful, even in the Hanhai District boundary, it can be ranked in the top 100, and it is a real top district boundary.

And yet this day.

A figure appeared in the primordial black sea of this community boundary.

In an instant, this figure released countless black rays of light, enveloping countless beings in the entire community realm, even those sevenfold primordial ancestors.

In an instant, a large number of Dao Ancestors were devoured.

"Black Silence Dao Ancestor, you are looking for !!! death"

Figures emerged one after another.

In an instant, a golden palace appeared, and six Dao Ancestors appeared from it, directly interrupting the movements of the Black Silence Dao Ancestor.

"You're lying in ambush here!"

The Black Lonely Dao Ancestor was a little surprised.

"Hmph, Black Silence Dao Ancestor, you have been devouring Dao Ancestor all these years, there are so many Dao Ancestors in the River Wind Community Realm, and there are also many foreign Dao Ancestors, all of whom live here, you will definitely attack here. So, we're in ambush here. This time, don't you want to leave, we've blocked this place with the Forbidden Dao Palace, don't you want to escape!"

One of the Dao Ancestors said.

These six Dao Ancestors are all half-step eightfold ancestors, and the Black Silence Dao Ancestor is also a half-step eightfold ancestor.

"Hahaha, just by you, you also want to kill me? The Yuan Dao we have comprehended is all the Eightfold Yuan Dao, and my Eightfold Yuan Dao is infinitely close to the extreme realm, and some of you have not even cultivated the Yuan Dao to the consummation realm, it is really ridiculous to want to kill me!"

The Black Silence Dao Ancestor sneered, not taking these six Dao Ancestors in his eyes at all.

"Well, what if I make a move!"

The voice of a Dao Ancestor came.

In the next moment, a young man dressed in white appeared in the perception of the Black Silent Dao Ancestor.

Seeing this young man, the pupils of the Black Silent Dao Ancestor shrank sharply.

"Taibai Daozu, why did you return to the boundary of Hanhai District!!!

He was terrified.

Although this Dao Ancestor is also a half-step Eightfold Origin Ancestor, what he has comprehended is the Ninefold Yuan Dao, and he has cultivated to the extreme realm, he can already impact the Eightfold Origin Ancestor, but he has not been impacted, but wants to impact the Eightfold Origin Ancestor realm with better potential and foundation.

The strength of Taibai Dao Ancestor far surpassed him, and the gap between the Ninefold Yuan Dao and the Eightfold Yuan Dao in the later stage was getting bigger and bigger, and it was difficult to make up for it.

A half-step eightfold ancestor like Taibai Daozu could almost kill him in an instant.

At this moment, the Black Silence Dao Ancestor was very frightened.

He chose to devour countless Dao Ancestors in the Hanhai District Realm, and he also felt that the half-step Eightfold Origin Ancestor in the Hanhai Region Realm was not powerful, and the truly powerful Half-Step Eightfold Origin Ancestor had left, so if he was careful, no one could help him.

But he didn't expect that Taibai Daozu would come back at this time.

"Damn, devour some more Dao Ancestors, and I will have the hope of comprehending my Yuan Dao to the extreme realm, just a little bit!!"

Hei Lonely Daozu knew that he was far from being Taibai Daozu's opponent, and he didn't even have the courage to do it, but he didn't give up.

He still has the hole card to escape!

"Black Silence Dao Ancestor, you could have lived well, staying in the Hanhai District Boundary with your half-step Eightfold Ancestor's cultivation, it is a near-invincible existence, no one can threaten your status, but you have gone too far this time, so you should die!"

Taibai Daozu held a sword in his hand and slashed at it with a sword.

At this moment, it was as if all the Yuan Dao was about to be torn apart.

This sword, the Black Silence Dao Ancestor can't stop it.

However.

At this time, the Black Lonely Dao Ancestor sacrificed his Dao Fruit, and there was a black lotus on top of the Dao Fruit.

The next moment.

The black lotus devoured the Dao Fruit, and the black lotus devoured everything.

"Not good!"

The expressions of the six half-step eightfold primordial ancestors, one by one, changed drastically.

And the boundary of the river wind community also began to crumble.

In an instant, the boundary of the River Wind Community was completely shattered, and countless living beings were destroyed.

And although Taibai Daozu's sword stabbed the black lotus, it only cracked the black lotus, and did not break it.

Then, the black lotus exploded, and countless black lights enveloped the surroundings.

Taibai Dao Ancestor only had time to protect those six half-step eightfold primordial ancestors, and as for the other Dao Ancestors in the riverside area, he couldn't protect them, because it was too late.

Soon, the black glow dissipated.

The boundary of the riverside community disappeared, and the Forbidden Dao Palace that blocked the void was completely shattered, and at this moment they all appeared in the Silent Black Sea.

And except for the Black Lotus Fragment, there was no figure of the Black Lonely Dao Ancestor.

"Taibai Dao Ancestor, has the Black Silence Dao Ancestor fallen?"

A Dao Ancestor asked suspiciously.

Taibai Dao Ancestor shook his head, "There shouldn't be, the black lotus sacrificed by the Black Silence Dao Ancestor just now should be the Void Treasure Lotus among the Ten Black Lotus, the Void Treasure Lotus is good at escaping, the Black Silence Dao Ancestor blew up the Void Treasure Lotus, broke the blockade, and then fled away with a trace of the origin of the Void Treasure Lotus." He is very clever and knows that the light is empty of Baolian, and he can't escape in front of me at all. Therefore, he burned the Dao Fruit and combined it with the Void Treasure Lotus, and only then did he break the blockade, let alone me, even the Eightfold Origin Ancestor might not be able to stop him!"

"How could the Sky Treasure Lotus be in the hands of the Black Silence Dao Ancestor?"

They were very puzzled, after all, such a good thing, even the Yae Origin Ancestor needed it!

"The Black Silence Dao Ancestor burned the Dao Fruit, and it was not damaged and broken, so it was difficult to recover. Even if he really has the treasure of recovery, he doesn't have the strength right now, you can find it yourself, I still have something to do, so I won't stay in the Hanhai District!"

With that, Taibai Daozu left.

These Dao Ancestors didn't have the idea of letting Taibai Dao Ancestor stay, after all, Tai Bai Dao Ancestor was able to rush back in time to help, they were already very grateful, where did they dare to let Taibai Dao Ancestor continue to guard the boundary of Hanhai District!

"Inform the other forces and arrest and find the Black Silence Dao Ancestor together!"

"Well, the other half-step eightfold ancestors were reluctant to make a move before, this time the Black Silence Dao Ancestor no longer has the cultivation of the half-step eightfold Dao ancestor, even the half-step sevenfold ancestor can deal with him, those half-step eightfold ancestors should dare to make a move!"

"Don't expect that group of cowards, just protect your own community boundary, let's let the ancestors of Hanhai Palace look for it!"

"Let's go, go back and use the Hanhai Boundary Map, deduce and search for the approximate location of the Black Silence Dao Ancestor, and then send a large number of Dao Ancestors to find it, I don't believe that the Black Silence Dao Ancestor can hide so deep after he is no longer cultivating!"

Whew!!

These six half-step eightfold ancestors of the Hanhai Palace quickly went back.

And not long after, the Black Silence Dao Ancestor was hit hard, lost the Dao Fruit, and the matter of the great drop in cultivation was publicized, and suddenly countless Dao Ancestors were overjoyed, and they all breathed a sigh of relief.

There are also many Dao Ancestors who are ready to look for the Black Silence Dao Ancestor and take the opportunity to kill the Black Silence Dao Ancestor, so that they can obtain the countless treasures on the Black Silence Dao Ancestor!
